functional_requirements.title: Create Project
functional_requirements.description: Create a new project with name, description, and owner. Check that owner exists. Default status 'planning'. Record creation time.

functional_requirements.title: Update Project
functional_requirements.description: Update project info: description, owner, status, deadline. Check project exists.

functional_requirements.title: Delete Project
functional_requirements.description: Delete project and all its tasks. Check project exists.

functional_requirements.title: Create Task
functional_requirements.description: Create a task under a project with title, description, priority, estimated hours. Check project exists and status is planning or active. Default status 'todo'. No assignee.

functional_requirements.title: Assign Task
functional_requirements.description: Assign a task to a team member. Check task exists and unassigned or reassignable. Check member exists and available. Optionally check skills. Update assignee_id. Set member status to busy.

functional_requirements.title: Update Task Status
functional_requirements.description: Update task status. Check task exists. Status flow: todo->in_progress->review->done. Blocked can be set anytime. Record actual hours when done.

functional_requirements.title: Complete Task
functional_requirements.description: Complete a task. Check status is 'review'. Update status to 'done'. Record actual hours. Release member (set available).

functional_requirements.title: Delete Task
functional_requirements.description: Delete a task. Check task exists. If assigned, release member.

functional_requirements.title: List Project Tasks
functional_requirements.description: List tasks of a project with optional filters: status, priority, assignee. Show task details and progress.

functional_requirements.title: Get Member Tasks
functional_requirements.description: Get all tasks for a member, current and historical. Calculate total hours.

functional_requirements.title: Get Project Progress
functional_requirements.description: Get project progress: total tasks, completion rate, status counts, estimated vs actual hours, estimated completion time.

functional_requirements.title: Add Member
functional_requirements.description: Add a team member with ID, name, role, skills, availability. Check member ID is unique.

functional_requirements.title: Update Member Availability
functional_requirements.description: Update member availability. Check that member has no ongoing task before setting offline.

non_functional_requirements.description: Data must be consistent across the three in-memory data sources (members, projects, tasks) during operations like assignment, status updates, and deletions.
Error handling must cover invalid project/task/member, status conflicts, and state violations with appropriate error messages.

acceptance_criteria.description: Create project: owner must exist; project_id auto-generated; status defaults to 'planning'; creation time recorded.
Update project: only existing projects can be updated; owner assignment checks existence; status changes are recorded.
Delete project: project must exist; all associated tasks are deleted; if tasks were assigned, members are released.
Create task: project must exist and be in 'planning' or 'active' status; task defaults to 'todo' and no assignee.
Assign task: task must exist and be unassigned; member must exist and be 'available'; skill match is optional; assignee_id set; member status becomes 'busy'.
Update task status: task must exist; status transitions follow the prescribed flow (todo->in_progress->review->done); blocked can be set anytime; actual hours recorded on done.
Complete task: task must be in 'review' status; status changes to 'done'; actual hours recorded; assignee's availability set to 'available'.
Delete task: task must exist; if assigned, member is released.
List project tasks: returns tasks filtered by status, priority, assignee if provided; shows task details.
Get member tasks: returns current and completed tasks for member; total hours computed correctly.
Get project progress: returns total tasks, completion rate (completed/total), status counts, estimated vs actual hours, and estimated completion time.
Add member: new member must have unique member_id; fields as specified.
Update member availability: member must exist; cannot set offline if member has ongoing tasks.

storage.details: Three independent in-memory data structures for members, projects, and tasks.

glossary.member: A team member with a role (developer, designer, tester, manager), skills, and availability status.
glossary.project: A collection of tasks with an owner, status (planning, active, completed, cancelled), and deadline.
glossary.task: A unit of work assigned to a member with status (todo, in_progress, review, done, blocked), priority, and hours.
glossary.status flow: The allowed transitions for task status: todo->in_progress->review->done; blocked can be set at any time.
glossary.availability: Member state: available (free for work), busy, offline.

global_state_sources.description: Stores team member information. Pre-populated with 6 members.

item_schema.title: string
item_schema.status: string (enum: todo, in_progress, review, done, blocked)

input_spec.description: Input is a JSON object with 'command' and 'project_data' fields. The 'project_data' contains parameters varying by command.

schema.command: string (enum: create_project, update_project, delete_project, create_task, assign_task, update_task_status, complete_task, delete_task, list_project_tasks, get_member_tasks, get_project_progress, add_member, update_member_availability)

output_spec.description: Output is a JSON object with 'success', 'message', and 'data' fields.

schema.data: any (returned data, e.g., created IDs, task details, progress info)
